headline: Jim Cramer Recommends Capital One for “Broader Scale and a More Durable Credit Card Franchise”
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is among the stocks Jim Cramer reviewed while discussing the Iran ceasefire that triggered a relief rally. Cramer explained why he keeps a positive outlook on the company’s acquisition of Discover, as he said: And if you want a mainstream lender with more exposure to the mass market, I’d rather […]

headline: Summer travel costs are up this year. 5 of the best ways to save money on your trip.
summary: As gas and airfare prices rise, we found the best ways you can save on summer travel.

headline: Capital One Completes Brex Deal To Deepen AI Driven Business Banking
summary: Capital One Financial (NYSE:COF) has completed its acquisition of Brex, a corporate spend management platform. The deal brings Brex’s business payments technology and customer base into Capital One’s business banking franchise. The transaction adds AI driven capabilities focused on corporate card, spend controls, and payment workflows. For business customers, this move links Capital One’s credit and banking products with Brex’s software tools for managing company spending and payments. It...
